description_long: This object is a compact rifle with a black metal receiver and a folding skeletonized stock, reminiscent of the AKS-74U style. The handguard and pistol grip are made of wood, providing a classic contrast to the otherwise matte black finish. The magazine is curved and appears to be detachable, constructed from a similar wood or polymer material. The rifle features standard iron sights, with a front post and a rear notch, and a short barrel with a visible flash hider at the muzzle. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments where maneuverability is important. The combination of metal and wood materials gives it a rugged, reliable appearance.
description: A compact black rifle with a folding skeletonized stock, wooden handguard and grip, curved detachable magazine, iron sights, and a short barrel with a flash hider.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the muzzle end, showing the narrow profile and the front sight post.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the folding skeletonized stock, wooden handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_2: The rifle is viewed from above, highlighting the top rail, rear sight, and the alignment of the barrel and magazine.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the folding stock, wooden grip, and the details of the receiver and magazine.
